task.title: Task Topic Template
task.shortdesc: Use this template guidance to write task topics that let new users execute commands and verify outcomes.

prereq.p: State environment setup, required files, and permissions.

step.cmd: Start each step with an imperative command.

info.p: Add context only when needed for safe execution.

step.cmd: Include exact commands in code blocks.

info.p: Use command examples that can run without hidden assumptions.

step.cmd: Add verification checks after critical commands.

info.p: Use report filtering commands or explicit expected outputs.

result.p: State the observable outcome and named artifacts produced by the task.
result.codeblock: Expected output: - Artifact names and locations - Key status fields or counts - Verification command result shape
